known_large.reason: Published migration history is intentionally kept together; do not split only for ranking.
Central SQLite current schema DDL; size alone is not a refactor signal.
Embedded Objective-C launcher source; large text block with low Python control-flow complexity.

Security-sensitive updater download orchestration facade over plan/fetch/publish/marker modules. Do not add new trust policy, channel, key lifecycle, or artifact type without focused tests and a dedicated module.
Security-sensitive updater download path planning and filesystem guards. Do not add network fetch, trust policy, or apply behavior here; split if adding another artifact layout family.

Security-sensitive updater network fetch and staged verification boundary. Do not add filesystem publish, updater apply behavior, or trust-key lifecycle here; keep final URL, size, manifest, and asset checks covered by focused tests.
Security-sensitive verified download marker and atomic publish logic. Do not add network fetch, trust policy, or updater apply behavior here; split if adding another marker schema family.
Central sensitive-output redaction policy. Do not add collector-specific raw secret passthrough; split when adding a new major URL/path/token/header/metadata redaction family.

External Facebook DOM extraction orchestration. Do not add DB writes, notification behavior, or runtime transitions; split raw payload, normalization, diagnostics, or collection loop when a new extraction source or diagnostics family is added.

External Facebook feed DOM extraction orchestration. Do not add DB writes, notification behavior, or runtime transitions; split raw payload, normalization, diagnostics, or collection loop when a new extraction source or diagnostics family is added.

Bundled browser-side sort adjustment JavaScript payloads. Do not add Python business logic, DB access, or runtime state behavior; split again before adding another independent browser-side payload family.

Bundled browser-side current-label/menu-candidate JavaScript payloads. Do not add Python business logic, DB access, or runtime state behavior; split again before adding another independent browser-side payload family.
Feed extraction metadata and seen-stop diagnostics vocabulary. Do not add DOM calls, scroll lifecycle, DB writes, or notification behavior here; split again if adding another diagnostics family.
Comments extraction metadata and DOM-settle diagnostics vocabulary. Do not add DOM calls, guard lifecycle, DB writes, or notification behavior here; split again if adding another diagnostics family.
Feed DOM payload normalization and item debug metadata cleanup. Do not add page evaluation, scrolling, DB writes, or runtime state transitions here; split again if adding another feed payload source.

Comments DOM payload normalization and alias-based dedupe. Do not add page evaluation, DOM settle, guard lifecycle, DB writes, or runtime state transitions here; split again if adding another comments payload source.

Notification outbox enqueue and after-commit wake boundary. Do not add sender implementations, retry UX, or blocking async resident dispatch; split message builders before adding another notification event family.
Notification outbox claim/send/retry/recovery boundary. Do not add scan finalize writes or enqueue policy here; split cleanup/retention if dispatch cleanup gains another policy family.
Thin notification outbox cleanup use-case names over existing repository cleanup policies. Do not add retry, dead-letter UX, pending/processing cleanup, or retention SQL here.

Dashboard read-side aggregation for target rows, sidebar sections, invariant warnings, previews, notification summaries, and degraded states. Keep new read-model families in focused modules before expanding this file.

Runtime state repository with guarded conditional updates. Do not add broad full-row saves in formal resident paths or unguarded worker transitions; split when adding a new runtime state family or recovery policy.
Windows tray integration combines OS callback wiring and process control. Do not add worker, scheduler, or Web UI product logic here; split when adding another tray command family.

watchlist.reason: Formal resident attempt path; review before adding more failure or ownership branches.
Shared scan commit path; changes can affect dedupe, history, latest scan, and notifications.
auto_adjust_sort native click state machine spans sync/async Playwright stages and diagnostics.
TargetApplicationService should remain a composition facade; add product logic in focused services first.
Hit records route is acceptable now, but future search/export/detail/bulk behavior should move into focused query/action services.
Dashboard UI presenter helpers. Split before adding another independent target, card, sidebar, or settings presentation family.
Scan/runtime diagnostics text and summary presentation. Keep extractor diagnostics parsing, dashboard rendering, and template strings separated before adding another diagnostics family.

Async commit-ready scanner still performs read-side DB seen-stop checks inside the feed collection loop. If collection loop behavior changes, consider prefetching bounded seen state before browser collection.
Dashboard sidebar aggregator shell. Keep feature logic in menu/groups/templates modules instead of growing this file again.
Dashboard sidebar group drag/drop and grouping interactions. Split again if adding another independent group-management workflow.
Target card shell. Keep modal, form, header, runtime note, and preview markup in target-card partials instead of growing this file again.
Target card config form partial. Split field groups before adding another independent target configuration family.
TargetRow 是 template-facing view model，集中 target 狀態、refresh、diagnostics、sidebar 與設定呈現；新增另一個獨立 UI presentation family 前應先拆 focused presenter。
must_not_add: 新的獨立 dashboard presentation family
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 target status/sidebar/diagnostics/refresh presentation family 或 TargetRow 持續膨脹

watchlist.reason: SidebarGroupSection 聚合 group monitoring、template form proxy 與 sidebar display state；新增 group workflow 前應先拆 group template/status presenter。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 group workflow、group diagnostics 或 group-level presentation family

watchlist.reason: _target_sidebar.html 應維持 sidebar include shell；新增 sidebar UI family 前需拆 partial 並保護現有 selector contract。
must_not_add: new sidebar modal family without partial split
new JavaScript selector contract without documenting it
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 sidebar UI family 或額外 group/target action area

watchlist.reason: Release metadata validation gate；download/apply/trust lifecycle 應留在各自模組，不應塞回 release_check。
must_not_add: manifest key lifecycle or channel policy
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增獨立 release policy family 或整合 download/apply 行為

watchlist.reason: 本機 runtime launcher glue 負責 CLI/startup/shutdown/tray/uvicorn coordination；新產品 use case 應進 application services 或 focused runtime modules。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增 launcher mode、long-running runtime component 或 platform-specific lifecycle behavior

watchlist.reason: Resident metadata refresh job family；cover image refresh、scan commit 與 notification dispatch 不應放入此模組。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增不同 browser/wait/resource-loading 行為的 metadata refresh family

watchlist.reason: Resident cover image refresh job family；metadata refresh、scan commit 與 dashboard presentation 不應放入此模組。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增另一種 image refresh source 或 refresh policy family

watchlist.reason: Resident maintenance 共用錯誤分類與 log 邊界；實際 maintenance job 行為應留在各 job module。
watchlist.split_trigger: 新增錯誤 taxonomy family 或跨 job retry/recovery policy
